message:
fix: model/switch endpoints respect CLI pin state (#117)

/api/model now checks AGENT_PIN_CLI and AGENT_CLI_PINNED before writing
the governor model file. If CLI is pinned, the backend stays unchanged
(copilot stays copilot even when switching to a claude-* model). Returns
400 if the requested model is incompatible with the pinned CLI.

/api/switch now rejects backend changes when CLI is pinned, returning
400 with a message to unpin first.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
